function.name: calculate_loan_emi
function.description: Calculate the monthly EMI for a loan.
function.long_description: Calculates the Equated Monthly Installment (EMI), total payment, and total interest for a loan based on principal amount, annual interest rate, and loan tenure.
example_user_queries: Calculate the EMI for a loan of 500000 at 8.5% annual interest for 5 years.
What is the monthly EMI for 1200000 with a 9.2% rate over 15 years?
Find the EMI for a principal of 250000, interest rate 7.75%, and tenure 3 years.
Compute my loan EMI for 900000 at 10% per year for 20 years.
If I borrow 350000 at 6.9% for 4 years, what will the EMI be?
Work out the EMI on a 750000 loan with 11.5% annual interest and 10 years tenure.
Show the EMI for principal 2000000, annual interest 8.1, tenure 25 years.
How much do I pay monthly for a 650000 loan at 9% over 7 years?
Calculate loan EMI using principal 425000, annual_interest_rate 12.5, tenure_years 2.
Estimate the monthly installment for 1500000 at 7.2% across 12 years.
